# HowToEdibles

> Cannabis edibles recipe site with dosage calculator. 237 recipes across 8 categories with precise THC dosing guidance.

## About

HowToEdibles helps people safely prepare cannabis-infused food at home. Every recipe includes a dosage calculator that computes mg of THC per serving based on the amount of cannabis, its potency percentage, and number of portions.

The core formula: dosage_mg = (10 × grams × strength_percent) / num_portions

## Key Pages

- [Dosage Calculator](https://www.howtoedibles.com/calculator.html): Interactive THC dosage calculator for any cannabis recipe
- [All Recipes](https://www.howtoedibles.com/): 237 cannabis edible recipes with dosage info
- [Science of Decarboxylation](https://www.howtoedibles.com/science-of-decarboxylation.html): Why and how to activate THC before cooking
- [How Long Do Edibles Take to Kick In](https://www.howtoedibles.com/how-long-do-edibles-take-to-kick-in.html): Onset times, duration, and factors
- [Cannabis Edibles for Beginners](https://www.howtoedibles.com/cannabis-edibles-for-beginners.html): Start low, go slow guide
- [Microdosing Edibles](https://www.howtoedibles.com/microdosing-edibles.html): Low-dose cannabis consumption guide
- [CBD vs THC](https://www.howtoedibles.com/cbd-vs-thc.html): Differences between cannabinoids
- [Benefits of Edibles vs Smoking](https://www.howtoedibles.com/benefits-of-edibles-compared-to-smoking.html): Health comparison
- [How to Prevent a Bad Trip](https://www.howtoedibles.com/how-to-prevent-a-bad-trip.html): Safety and harm reduction

## Recipe Categories

- Desserts: Brownies, cookies, cakes, chocolate truffles, ice cream
- Drinks: Smoothies, hot chocolate, tea, lemonade, coffee
- Snacks: Gummies, granola bars, popcorn, trail mix
- Essentials: Cannabutter, cannabis oil, tinctures, sugar
- Lunch: Soups, salads, sandwiches, pasta, pizza
- Keto: Low-carb fat bombs, keto brownies, cheese crisps
- Vegan: Plant-based edibles without dairy or animal products
- International: Feijoada, brigadeiro, churros, baklava, mochi

## Safety Information

- Recommended starting dose: 2.5-5mg THC for beginners
- Standard dose: 10mg THC per serving
- Onset time: 30-90 minutes (can take up to 2 hours)
- Duration: 4-8 hours
- Always label cannabis edibles clearly and store away from children

## Languages

Available in English, Portuguese (BR), Spanish, German, and Chinese (Simplified).
